message:
dashboard: push live summaries via SSE instead of one-shot fetch (#31)

server.js polls agent-summaries.sh every 5s and merges the result with
the live pane 'doing' field into a.liveSummary on each agent object.
index.html now consumes a.liveSummary directly from the SSE stream
so summary blocks update on every event tick (~5s) rather than once
per page load. Removes the stale fetch('/api/summaries') double-render
and drops unused currentSummaries variable.

Also removes Opus 4.7 from the model switcher dropdown (we only use 4.6).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
